NAVAREA XIX 107/19

BARENTS SEA
HYDROGRAPHIC SURVEY WILL BE CARRIED OUT FROM 30.SEP TO 06.OCT 2019 BY RESEARCH VESSEL POURQUOI PAS CS FMCF,TOWING 1000 METERS LONG CABLE IN THE AREA DELIMITED BY THE FOLLOWING POSITIONS:
A.74-30N-021-30EB.74-30N-022-30EC.73-30N-022-30ED.73-30N-021-30E
SUBSEA SCIENTIFIC MOORINGS WILL ALSO BE DEPLOYEDWIDE BERTH FROM AREA REQUESTED.
